The '''Devaronian Army''' defended the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] homeworld of [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]. [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]], later known as the drunkard Labria in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the Devaronian Army, following sixteen generations of family tradition. The Devaronian Army [[Battle of Montellian Serat|suppressed]] a rebellion on Devaron early in the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. It was an extremely large army with advanced weaponry and [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and possessed a strong confidence in the face of battle.

{{Military-stub}}
